titleStmt.title: SII 36.295: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 295. (A.R. No. 295 of 1910.) PULIPPARKŌYIL, MADHURANTAKAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Vyāghrapādēśvara temple.

summary.p: (Śaka 1374, Āṅgīrasa, Vrichchika (Kārttikai), śu., 5, Tiruvōṇam = A.D. 1452, November 16, Thursday.).

Records that Kaṇakkaṉpaṭṭu alias Chēdirāyananallūr, a tirunāmattukkāṇi village was granted as dēvadāṉa-iṟaiyili to the temple of Tiruppulippagava Nāyaṉār at Pattūr, the northern hamlet of Madhurāntakachaturvēdimaṅglam in Kaḷattūrk-kōṭṭam, a subdivision of Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻamaṇḍalam, by Dēvappagaḷ, son of Mahāpradāni Annadāta Daṇṇāyakkar for the health of the king. The income from the taxes like poṉ-vari, dāṉiyavargam, and other levies from the village shall be utilized for the early morning wakeup service (tiruppaḷḷi-eḻuchchi), for smearing of ungunts on the body of the god and other services in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī man mahā rājādhirāja rājaparameśvara śrīvīrapratāpa prauḍa devarāya mahārāyar
prayvirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 3 100 7 10 4ṉ mel cellā niṉṟa Āṅkira varuṣam
praścikanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu pañcamiyum peṟṟa tiruvoṇattu nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa maṇṭalattu kaḷattūṟ
koṭṭattu śrī maturāntakac caturvvetimaṅkalattu vaṭapiṭākai pāttūr Uṭaiyār tiruppulippakava nāyināṟku śrīmaṉ
mahāpradāni Aṉṉadāta daṇṇāyakkar kumāra devappakaḷ Irāyar tirumeṉikku naṉṟāka kaḷattūr paṟṟu kaṇakkaṉ paṭṭu Āṉa
cētirāyanallūr tiruṉāmattukkāṇi Āṉa Intak kiṟāmam tevatāṉa Iṟaiiliyākak kuṭuttom Inta Ūril Uṇṭu Āṉa poṉvaṟka
tāṉiyavaṟkam maṟṟum Antap paṟṟil naṭakkum paḻavari putuvarikaḷum cakala camutāyap piṟāttiyum Iṉṉāyiṉāṟku tiruppaḷḷieḻuccik kuṟaivaṟuppukkum
Aṅkaraṅka pokattukkum pūcai tiruppaṇikkum Iṉṉāḷ mutalāka cantirātittavaraikkum naṭakkumpaṭikku sarvvamānya mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiili
Ākak kuṭuttom Intat taṉmattukku Akitam paṇṇiṉavarkaḷ keṅkaik karaiyil kārām pacuvaik koṉṟa pāvattile pokak
kaṭavarkaḷ Ākavum śrī māheśvara rakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 36.295 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
